rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Def. The Hertz Corp.S Notice Of Obj. And Mot. To Exclude Testimony Of Dr. Egilman Related To The Standard Of Care Or, In The Alternative, For Leave To Supplement The Hertz Corp.S Expert Disclosure
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 15, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant The Hertz Corporataion's Objection And Motion To Exclude Testimony Of Dr. Egilman Related To The Standard Of Care Or, In The Alternative, For Leave To Supplement The Hertz Corporation's Expert Disclosure is off calendar pending the trial judge's ruling on defendant's motion in limine regarding this issue. = (503/TLJ)
